data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of providing an override option for preferred clients to see full availability. However, the evidence does not demonstrate that this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case describes the intended behavior but lacks concrete evidence of the override mechanism in action, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of the override option for preferred clients to see full availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
